articles.author: Russell Contreras, Avery Lotz
articles.title: What a weakened Voting Rights Act means in today's America - Axios
articles.content:
Catch up quick: The court's Louisiana v. Callais ruling on Wednesday effectively narrowed Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, which prohibited racially-discriminatory gerrymandering.

articles.title: ABR’s Trifecta Picks for the 2026 Kentucky Derby - americasbestracing.net
articles.description: Post positions have been drawn and morning-line odds assigned for a very competitive 152nd Kentucky Derby Presented by Woodford Reserve May 2 at Churchill Downs. The $5 million Derby is set to run at 6:57 p.m.
